mapper.sql: id, name, slug, parent_id, sort_order, description, article_count, status, create_time, update_time, deleted, deleted_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM category ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM category
name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR slug LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT FROM category WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE category SET name = #{name}, slug = #{slug}, parent_id = #{parentId}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, description = #{description}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
